arts.ttl: Bayern Munich plan to recall six loan players early for Club World Cup
arts.sum: Germany's preeminent footballing publication reports that FC Bayern Munich plan on giving six loan players an audition at the forthcoming Cub World Cup in the USA.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane's Liverpool transfer message from Alan Shearer speaks volumes about character
arts.sum: Liverpool have been urged to sign a new striker in the summer transfer window, with Alan Shearer claiming that Harry Kane would be the ideal signing

arts.ttl: Insult to Injury: Bayern Munich’s Alphonso Davies reportedly said he was fit enough to play for Canada vs. USMNT in Nations League third place match
arts.sum: On par with Bayern Munich ’s standard issued luck when it comes to injuries, the German Rekordmeister have been dealt a massive blow with Alphonso Davies having torn his ACL while away on international duty with the Canadian national team. Unfortunately for Davies, Canada, and Bayern, the left back/left winger wound up tearing his anterior cruciate ligament after initially picking up the injury in the semi-final clash against Mexico.

arts.ttl: Pavlovic easing back into light strength training, Sky reports
arts.sum: Die Rekordmeister fans will be glad to hear their talented young midfielder is slowly progressing back to fitness.
